attachments.name: Admiral - CW OP HIP Claim Form.docx

EmailTemplate.description: Follow up email to Admiral CW/OP/HIP claim.
EmailTemplate.name: FNOL to Insured – CW/OP/HIP Admiral claims
EmailTemplate.subject: Information required to support claims process
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for your telephone call earlier notifying us of a new (insert type of claim).
In order that we can present a claim to insurers, please could you fully complete and return the attached claim form.
I have attached your policy schedule and policy wordings to assist.
I look forward to hearing from you.
If you have any queries, please do not hesitate to contact me on 01242 802531.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Claims Team
E: claims@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
